summary: The project now has five bounded workflow templates, tool-backed local file, CSV, JSON, and HTTP context analysis, bounded dataset computation, structured outputs in multiple formats, audit persistence, acceptance coverage, a guided Streamlit inspection UI with shareable run/acceptance/cache exports, and beta-facing onboarding docs including a support matrix and task pack. The current push is to bridge the gap between the repo-based technical beta and a future installer-based beta by keeping the guided UI simple, moving desktop-mode runtime data into user-writable app folders, persisting startup diagnostics for packaged-app troubleshooting, surfacing plain-language Ollama readiness guidance before execution, and validating the first locally built macOS app and DMG previews on another machine.
completed_items: Closed-loop supervisor orchestration with research, writing, and optional review stages
Bounded workflow planning that routes between research, analysis, comparison, and hybrid advisory/context requests
Structured workflow output with pretty, JSON, and Markdown renderers
Local tool integration with file preview, CSV analysis, JSON analysis, bounded dataset computation, and bounded HTTP fetch adapters
Local audit persistence, acceptance reporting, request cache, and retry plumbing

Guided Streamlit inspection for task input, plan preview, route warnings, intermediate results, recent runs, acceptance reports, cache health, per-item drill-downs, and shareable run/acceptance/cache exports
Trial-readiness roadmap section that defines beta audience, entry surfaces, exit criteria, and feedback expectations
Beta-facing support matrix, task pack, quickstart, and feedback collection entrypoints
Guided-mode starter tasks that preload beginner-friendly sample workflows in the Streamlit UI
Packaging-friendly desktop launcher entrypoint for future native app bundling
Desktop-mode runtime paths that move persisted UI artifacts into user-writable app locations
Desktop launcher startup diagnostics that can be written to the desktop support directory for packaged-app troubleshooting
Plain-language Ollama readiness checks in the UI so local-model setup problems are surfaced before execution
macOS packaging preview doc and build scaffold
First local macOS app-bundle preview built and structurally validated
First local macOS DMG preview built and structurally validated
next_items: Launch and validate the built macOS app and DMG previews on a second machine
Verify that desktop-mode first run works without depending on a repo checkout
Use the packaged-app startup diagnostics plus the second-machine validation checklist to capture external launch failures cleanly
Continue broadening bounded workflow planning and guarded analysis/comparison tools without destabilizing the guided UI
